game.title: Iron Flow
game.short_text: Keep your fighting flow going while freeing villages overrun by monsters!

details.title: Iron Flow
details.description:
Welcome to Iron Flow!
In this game you play as a cursed warrior who is losing his mind. Your only way to maintain clarity is through action. Run, fight, survive.
In the game you will have to beat challenging platforming stages that will push your parkouring skills to the limit. Time your attacks carefully as you defeat various monsters, including scary skeletons, goblins, wolfs and bats!
You must keep your flow going. To free the villages from monsters you will have to capture and defend flags from waves of monsters. Hold the point long enough to progress further. In each stage you will meet new enemies and the difficulty will increase!

CHANGELOG:
1.1 - added difficulty and volume settings in menu, adjusted platforms

Warning: the game can be pretty  difficult, requires a lot of skill!

Controls:
left and right arrows - move
spacebar - jump, dash in air

Submit your best time in the comments... if you can finish the game!
Game created for the GDevelop Big Game Jam #8You can check out the dev process on my X profile!

moreInfo.Author: rosolowski_dev
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Arcade, No AI, Pixel Art, Retro, Short, Singleplayer

details.title: Don't leave me
details.description:
After World War III, only Dexina remains: a dictatorship that controls people with chips that erase pain, memory, and free will.
You "died"... but you're still alive. Dumped in a junkyard, you decide to escape and find Lily before she suffers the same fate.
Your body is damaged from years of being deprived of freedom: sometimes it freezes, stiffens, or becomes unresponsive.
Your mission is to regain control, battling your own body's failings as you navigate through machines, enslaved workers, and a system that wants to leave you for dead again.
Explore, dodge, endure the pain, and recover your mobility to escape the factory.
A short game about surviving... and taking control for the first time.

details.title: The possession soul
details.description:
You are dead.
 
And now, trapped between two worlds, only one escape remains: take control.
 
Here, your soul has no weight, no shape. All that’s left is a void — a void that can only be filled by seizing the souls of those who have already departed, using the final spark of life that still lingers within them as fuel to flee the limbo swallowing you whole.
 
Every soul holds its final breath — and you choose how to spend it.
 
Stop time. Shift between realms. Plan, evade… all through bodies that are not your own. All of it by stealing seconds that never belonged to you.
 
Death is watching you.
 
Death is hunting you.
 
And the only way out is simple:
 
Control
.

How to play?
A E D to move
Space to jump
LShift  to dash
Use the mouse to aim when possessing a soul, and press the left mouse button to jump from the soul.

game.title: Oh, My PC
game.short_text: A hacker hijacked your PC. Beat his minigames and—uh—avoid a blue screen?

details.title: Oh, My PC
details.description:
Oh no! A hacker took control of your PC!
 
Beat him at his own minigames to take it back. Defuse bombs, pilot a spaceship, and… try not to get a blue screen? Yeah, I don’t know why that’s a thing either.
 
You can press X and Z to skip some dialogue if your attention span is that of a goldfish

game.title: Little Potion Post
game.short_text: A short, charming potion-making adventure

details.title: Little Potion Post
details.description:
Little Potion Post
Run a cozy potion stand in the heart of an enchanted forest.
When Mimi the witch must leave unexpectedly, she asks her friend Ash to take control of the shop. 
Mix essences, discover 36 potion combinations, and serve adorable fantasy creatures, where the order of ingredients really matters.
Unlock new essences each day, earn gold, and keep the customers happy… all while a picky magical cat keeps an eye on your cauldron.
A short, charming potion-making adventure about helping a friend and mastering the magic of the shop.
Long Version 
To keep this project under the asset limit for the jam upload, I reduced the game to one simplified level, bringing the asset count down to 970 from 2982. Because of this, many cosmetic details, animations, and progression elements had to be removed or shortened for the online version.
 
The full experience includes:
 
  5 complete days/levels
   all 36 potion combinations extra animations, visual details, and polish
If you'd like to enjoy the complete version of Little Potion Post with all the visuals and features included, you can download it separately. Thank you so much for trying the jam version and for your understanding! 💖✨

moreInfo.Author: lukbina
moreInfo.Tags: Animation, Cats, Cozy, Cute, gdeveloper, potions, Short

game.title: Dev's Plan
game.short_text: Rewrite reality from within a terminal. Gain the power to CREATE and DELETE, and defy the Developer's Rules.

details.title: Dev's Plan
details.description:
Dev’s Plan is a short experimental platformer where you explore a digital world built by a watchful, ever-present Dev().
They guide you. They instruct you. They monitor every move you make.
 
Until you find access to something you shouldn’t have: the system console.
 
From there? Everything changes.


🧪 FEATURES
  🟦 A minimal neon world
   🟩 Powers that let you bend the rules
   🟣 A console interface you were “not meant to open”
   🟥 A story told through system messages and your actions
   🕳️ A finale that destabilizes everything you thought you understood


🎮 HOW TO PLAY
  Move: WASD / Arrow Keys
   Jump: Space
   Console: [C] or [Right Mouse] Use system commands to modify the world
  [R] to Restart Level
Built solo for the GDevelop BIG Game Jam #8 in just 9 days. Short, strange, and designed to be experienced blind.
 
If players enjoy it, I may expand the concept further.

game.title: TRPMN: Master of Traps
game.short_text: Take control of traps and stop the player from escaping.

details.title: TRPMN: Master of Traps
details.description:
Take control of traps and stop the player from escaping

Your goal is to stop the player from escaping by activating traps at the right moment.

• Control the traps: spikes, lasers, saws, and more
• Timing-based strategy
• Brutal but satisfying kills: with optional gore mode
• Progressive challenges: new traps and twists unlock as you progress
• Minimalist pixel-art style: clean, dark, and atmospheric

Recommended Age: 13+
Contains pixelated gore (can be turned off).

game.title: Fluffloat
game.short_text: controlling the wind.

details.title: Fluffloat
details.description:
A physics puzzle where you guide a fragile wisp to the goal by controlling the wind.
-You don't control the wisp directly—you control the "wind" itself.
-Hold the left mouse button to create wind and gently guide the wisp.
-The wisp is very fragile! It will break if it hits a wall too hard or touches obstacles like "boxes," "stones," or "bugs."
-You can also use the wind to push "boxes" to move obstacles or clear a path.
-Lead the wisp from an underground dungeon to the surface with your delicate wind control!The sound effects (SE) used in this game are from the following site:

[soundeffect-lab] ([https://soundeffect-lab.info/sound/button/])
[dova-s.jp] ([https://dova-s.jp/bgm/play21316.html])
 ([https://dova-s.jp/bgm/play22655.html])

Protect your Tower whilst eliminating your opponent's to claim victory. Every decision matters in this strategic showdown!

details.title: The Great Claim
details.description:
The Great Claim
Made in 9 days for GDevelop BIG Game Jam #8 by a two-person team: TheAvIGOLD & Jurfix


About lore
Two rival Viking clans vie for dominance over a green island under the sun. Every decision matters, every village, mine, and forest can tip the balance of power. You are the young chieftain, inheriting the leadership of your clan and tasked with making it the greatest.


Take Control
The Great Claim is a tactical, turn-based strategy where you command your warriors, manage resources, and expand your holdings. Hire barbarians, build mines and lumber mills, and capture enemy buildings. Every turn gives you a chance to outsmart your rival and shape the battlefield.


Your Clan. Your Decisions. Your Victory.
The island belongs to those who act decisively. Strength lies not only in warriors, but in clever management and timely attacks. Take control, and let no enemy or wolf stand in your way. Every move you make can decide the fate of your clan.

moreInfo.Made with: Blender, Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Illustrator, GDevelop

details.title: Mush
details.description:
A short Puzzle platformer about taking a walk with a mushroom.
arrow keys for movement
B - lets you move boxes (don't get them stuck in corners)
S/space - lets you  release a spore which you can use to control creatures
M - lets you return to the menu.
Stuck? hit R to reset.
IF PLAYING ON MOBILE - rotate your phone to landscape.
Made for the Gdevelop game big game jam 2025.
play on gd.games!
feedback welcome.

INTRO
One Rich Guy, One Cult, One less Rich Guy! Welcome to Repossessed where you play as the ghost of a rich guy, going through the giant mansion to gain back your body, which was taken from you by the spirit of the previous owner who was the leader of a cult!

game.title: Possessed Portals
game.short_text: Help a spirit find its way home! There's many portals it needs to take home, but ghosts can't survive portal travel.

details.title: Possessed Portals
details.description: Lost in death, the spirit tries to find his way back home. This world only uses portals for long distance travel. Ghosts can't survive portal travel. Help it get home by possessing the corporeal bodies of guards and golems to make it through the portals.
